description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
While in manual mode, the Zoox vehicle was proceeding straight on Columbus St. through the intersection at Mason, when a pickup truck 
in the left adjacent lane turned right in front of the Zoox vehicle. The truck contacted the Zoox vehicle which incurred minor damage to its 
front left bumper. There were no injuries and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
